scripts.desktop:build: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File ../scripts/build_app_service.ps1 && npm run build && tauri build
scripts.desktop:build:debug: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File ../scripts/build_app_service.ps1 && npm run build && tauri build --debug
scripts.desktop:build:lowmem: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File ../scripts/build_app_service.ps1 && npm run build && powershell -NoProfile -Command "$env:CARGO_BUILD_JOBS='1'; $env:RUSTFLAGS='-Ccodegen-units=1'; tauri build"
